PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.text: AssetOut amount rounding via mulDivUp/mulWadUp must favor protocol (bidder pays more).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(): roundUp(auctionUsdValue * assetOutDecimals / price) >= exact_value

locations.note: mulDivUp and mulWadUp at lines 799 and 802 — rounding direction is security-critical
